name: Cloudflare WAF list JSON-object name rules
expected_lines: | nameString | An informative name for the list. | Maximum length: 50 characters.Only alphanumeric and underscore (\_) characters are valid.A valid name satisfies this regular expression: ^\[a-zA-Z0-9\_\]+$. |
reminders: Re-check the documented conflict between the Lists page lowercase-only rule and the JSON-object page alphanumeric rule.
Re-check whether warnings in internal/config/env_waf.go should stay lowercase-only.
Re-check whether uppercase list names should be accepted, warned on, or normalized.
